meta.source: Pariah Nexus Mission Deck v1.4 + Pariah Nexus Tournament Companion
meta.description: Pariah Nexus Chapter Approved matched play — Actions, Secret Missions, Strategic Footings

missionSequence: Deploy Armies (Defender first, TITANIC units = skip next deployment turn)

reservesRestrictions.maxUnitsInReserves: No more than half the number of units in army
reservesRestrictions.maxPointsInReserves: No more than half total points of army
reservesRestrictions.destroyedIfNotArrived: Any Reserves not on battlefield by end of round 3 count as destroyed (does not apply to units placed into Strategic Reserves during battle)

actions.description: Daring battlefield tasks units can attempt
cannotStart: Within Engagement Range of enemy (unless TITANIC CHARACTER)
Advanced or Fell Back this turn
Not eligible to shoot this phase (including already shot)
actions.whilePerforming: Not eligible to shoot or declare charge. TITANIC CHARACTER: cannot start another Action and cannot declare charge
actions.fails: If unit makes a move (excluding Pile-in/Consolidation) or leaves battlefield
actions.completionNotes: Each Action states when it starts, when it completes, and what happens if completed

secretMissions.when: End of third battle round — starting with player who had second turn
secretMissions.eligibility: If your Primary Mission VP total <= opponent's
secretMissions.selection: Secretly select one card from Secret Mission deck, place face-down
effects: In round 5, cannot score VP from Primary Mission
Cannot score more than 20VP from Primary Mission total
At end of battle, reveal card — if goal achieved, score VP

tactical.drawing: Draw 2 cards at start of first Command phase. Draw to maintain 2 active cards each subsequent Command phase
tactical.discarding: Discard when VP scored. Can discard voluntarily at end of either player's turn — gain 1CP if your turn
tactical.newOrders: 1CP — end of Command phase: discard one active card, draw one new card

cards.ASSASSINATION: 4VP per CHARACTER destroyed (Fixed) or 5VP at end of turn (Tactical)
cards.BEHIND_ENEMY_LINES: 3VP for 1 unit, 4VP for 2+ units wholly in opponent's deployment zone (excluding AIRCRAFT and Battle-shocked)
cards.BRING_IT_DOWN: 2VP per MONSTER/VEHICLE destroyed. +2VP if combined Wounds 15+. +2VP if combined Wounds 20+
cards.STORM_HOSTILE_OBJECTIVE: 4VP — control objective opponent had at start of turn, or opponent had none and you gained one
cards.CULL_THE_HORDE: 5VP each time INFANTRY unit destroyed if Starting Strength 20+, total Wounds 25+, or points sufficient for 20+ models
cards.RECOVER_ASSETS: 3VP for 2 units recovering assets, 6VP for 3 — units in deployment zone/No Man's Land/opponent's zone each perform action
cards.AREA_DENIAL: 2VP — units within 3" of centre, no enemy within 3". 5VP if no enemy within 6" of centre
cards.SECURE_NO_MANS_LAND: 2VP for 1 objective in No Man's Land, 5VP for 2+
cards.CONTAINMENT: 3VP per battlefield edge contained (up to 6VP) — units within 9" of edge perform action
cards.MARKED_FOR_DEATH: 5VP — opponent selects 3 units when drawn; score VP when one or more destroyed
cards.DEFEND_STRONGHOLD: 3VP — control objectives in deployment zone at end of opponent's turn or battle end
cards.SABOTAGE: 3VP if unit commits sabotage not in opponent's deployment zone, 6VP if in opponent's deployment zone — unit within terrain feature performs action
cards.OVERWHELMING_FORCE: 3VP each time enemy unit within range of objective destroyed (up to 5VP)
cards.EXTEND_BATTLE_LINES: 5VP — control objectives in own deployment zone AND No Man's Land. 2VP if only 1 unit remaining and controls 1 No Man's Land objective
cards.ENGAGE_ON_ALL_FRONTS: 2VP for 3 quarters, 4VP for 4 quarters — units in different table quarters more than 6" from centre
cards.ESTABLISH_LOCUS: 2VP at centre of battlefield, 4VP in opponent's deployment zone — unit performs action ending in that location
cards.CLEANSE: 2VP for 1 objective cleansed, 4VP for 2+ — units within range of objective perform action

missionRuleCards.INSPIRED_LEADERSHIP: While WARLORD not in own deployment zone and within 9" of unit taking Battle-shock test, add 1 to test
missionRuleCards.RAPID_ESCALATION: Round 1: BATTLELINE units from Strategic Reserves can arrive. Max 10%/20%/30% of points for Incursion/Strike Force/Onslaught
missionRuleCards.SMOKE_AND_MIRRORS: After deployment: each player can place one unit (up to 25%/50%/75% points) into Strategic Reserves
missionRuleCards.HIDDEN_SUPPLIES: Add one extra objective marker in No Man's Land. Shift centre marker 6" toward corner, place new one 6" toward opposite corner
missionRuleCards.RAISE_BANNERS: End of each player's turn: BATTLELINE unit within range of controlled objective scores 1VP and raises banner (cannot raise again on same objective)
missionRuleCards.STALWARTS: BATTLELINE units performing Actions still eligible to shoot. BATTLELINE units can perform Actions within Engagement Range of enemy
missionRuleCards.ADAPT_OR_DIE: Fixed: once per battle discard one Fixed Mission and replace. Tactical: twice per battle after drawing, draw extra card then shuffle one back
missionRuleCards.SWIFT_ACTION: BATTLELINE units that Advance or Fall Back still eligible to perform an Action
missionRuleCards.FOG_OF_WAR: Round 1: units have Benefit of Cover, no Core Stratagems (except New Orders)
missionRuleCards.PREPARED_POSITIONS: BATTLELINE units can be targeted with Go to Ground and Heroic Intervention for 0CP

primaryMissions.PURGE_THE_FOE: End of each battle round: 4VP if destroyed any enemy. From round 2: +4VP if more enemy than friendly destroyed. From round 2 end of Command phase: 4VP if control objectives + 4VP if more than opponent
primaryMissions.LINCHPIN: From round 2: if not controlling own deployment zone objective — 3VP per controlled objective. If controlling it — 3VP for it + 5VP per other (max 15VP per turn)
primaryMissions.SCORCHED_EARTH: Burn Objective action from round 2. 5VP per No Man's Land burned, 10VP per opponent's deployment zone burned. 5VP per controlled objective (max 10VP per turn)
primaryMissions.UNEXPLODED_ORDNANCE: No Man's Land objectives are Hazard markers. Move Hazard action. Score per hazard proximity to opponent's deployment zone each turn
primaryMissions.SUPPLY_DROP: Alpha/Omega objectives — Alpha removed round 4, others except Omega removed round 5. 5VP per No Man's Land round 2-3, 8VP round 4, 15VP round 5
primaryMissions.TERRAFORM: Terraform action on unclaimed objectives. 4VP per controlled + 2VP per terraformed (max 15VP per turn)
primaryMissions.BURDEN_OF_TRUST: 4VP per controlled objective not in own deployment zone. Select units to guard them. Opponent scores 2VP per unit guarding their objective
primaryMissions.TAKE_AND_HOLD: From round 2: 5VP per controlled objective (max 15VP per turn)
primaryMissions.THE_RITUAL: Remove all No Man's Land objectives except one. Ritual action to place new ones. 5VP per No Man's Land objective controlled (max 15VP)

tournamentMissionPool.keyDifference: Models CAN end any move on top of objective markers
tournamentMissionPool.objectiveMarkers: Treat as flat 40mm markers — no impediment to movement

terrainLayouts.primaryFeature: Ruins. Variety of heights important for Plunging Fire

heightKey.2inchesOrLess: Low sections — INFANTRY can move over freely
